subject: v2-S04 iter 6: image-NCC validation of clumped K=5 constellations
description: For each subject's best K=5 constellation, warp the CZ ROI binary map (cz_voronoi_labels) through composed (LP+sz-pin → aniso correction) into a target grid covering the local bbox at 4 µm spacing, crop HCR 488 (level-4 raw) to the same grid, and compute Pearson NCC. Report baseline (LP-only) NCC vs test (LP+aniso) NCC and delta. This tests whether the constellation's correction actually IMPROVES image alignment inside the local volume.
